title: scleria minor
intro: Scleria minor, also known as the lesser umbrella sedge, is a type of wetland grass that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scleria minor are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
